channel.title: Posts on 锦酱的博客
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on 锦酱的博客

item.title: Java 反射
item.description: 准备 定义一个User类 public class User { private String name; private int id; public User(String name, int id) { this.name = name; this.id = id; } public User() { } public String getName() { return name; } public void setName(String name) { this.name = name; } public int getId() { return id; } public void setId(int id) { this.id = id; } @Override public String toString() { return "User{" + "name='" + name + '\'' + ", id=" + id + '}'; } } Class类 获取Class类的三种方法 1、使用Class.
